headline: 暑期档新片蓄势待发
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周《痴迷》与《福尔摩斯小姐3》领跑趋势。多部大片如《玩具总动员5》等即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new releases today; Obsession and Enola Holmes 3 top weekly trends. Major titles like Toy Story 5 are on the horizon.

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，市场静待暑期档爆发
industryHighlights.en: No new films this week; market awaits summer surge

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》跻身本周趋势前列
industryHighlights.en: The Devil Wears Prada 2 ranks high in weekly trends

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》等新片定档，科幻冒险题材受关注
industryHighlights.en: Avatar: The Last Airbender and others scheduled; sci-fi adventure draws attention
